name: network-map-provider-feeder
description: Standalone feeder service for the Network Map project. Runs controlled Google Maps extraction jobs, stores raw results, and normalizes them into provider candidates in the shared Neon Postgres database.

scripts.check: node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/scraper.js && node --check src/jobSeeder.js && node --check src/schema.js && node --check scripts/migrate.js && node --check scripts/seed-jobs.js && node --check scripts/smoke.js
